en.title: FAQs Generator
en.prompt: Generate a list of 10 frequently asked questions based on the following content: [内容]
en.remark: Generate common Q&A based on content.

metaDescription: Building a help section? Generate a list of 10 frequently asked questions based on your content. Anticipate user needs and improve support instantly!

faq.q: The generated FAQ feels too generic, how do I make it fit the content?
faq.a: Prepend "write questions from the perspective of what real target users would actually ask, avoid hollow questions like 'what is this' that no one searches for, keep each question under 15 characters." The AI's default FAQ is usually just titles turned into question marks. This line forces it to switch perspectives.

faq.q: Can the questions be optimized for SEO to contain keywords?
faq.a: Append "every question must contain the main keyword X or a variant, and the Q&A pair should be usable directly as a SERP featured snippet candidate (answer 40-60 characters)." Output like this can go straight into FAQ Schema structured data and improves your odds of showing up in search.
